'''dawuthu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:kylomycin|kylomycin]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-w-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:kylomycin|kylomycin]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| dawuthu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:dæwithith|dæwithith]] || [[word:dæwithij|dæwithij]] || [[word:dæwithish|dæwithish]] || [[word:dæwithi|dæwithi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:dawuwuthuth|dawuwuthuth]] || [[word:dawuwuthuj|dawuwuthuj]] || [[word:dawuwuthush|dawuwuthush]] || [[word:dawuwuthu|dawuwuthu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:dawuthuth|dawuthuth]] || [[word:dawuthuj|dawuthuj]] || [[word:dawuthush|dawuthush]] || [[word:dawuthu|dawuthu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:dawufthuth|dawufthuth]] || [[word:dawufthuj|dawufthuj]] || [[word:dawufthush|dawufthush]] || [[word:dawufthuf|dawufthuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:dawuthuthu|dawuthuthu]] || [[word:dawuthuju|dawuthuju]] || [[word:dawuthushu|dawuthushu]] || [[word:dawuthuku|dawuthuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:dawuthuth|dawuthuth]] || [[word:dawuthuj|dawuthuj]] || [[word:dawuthush|dawuthush]] || [[word:dawuthu|dawuthu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:dawuthuthul|dawuthuthul]] || [[word:dawuthujul|dawuthujul]] || [[word:dawuthushul|dawuthushul]] || [[word:dawuthukul|dawuthukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:dawuthuthuthu|dawuthuthuthu]] || [[word:dawuthujuju|dawuthujuju]] || [[word:dawuthushushu|dawuthushushu]] || [[word:dawuthuku|dawuthuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:dawuthuthun|dawuthuthun]] || [[word:dawuthujun|dawuthujun]] || [[word:dawuthushun|dawuthushun]] || [[word:dawuthukun|dawuthukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:dawuthuthuoro|dawuthuthuoro]] || [[word:dawuthujuoro|dawuthujuoro]] || [[word:dawuthushuoro|dawuthushuoro]] || [[word:dawuthukuoro|dawuthukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5db7a01}}
